allow: Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/postgresql@16/bin/psql -U $USER postgres -c "DO $$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT FROM pg_catalog.pg_roles WHERE rolname = ''postgres''\) THEN CREATE ROLE postgres WITH LOGIN PASSWORD ''postgres'' SUPERUSER; END IF; END $$;")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/opt/postgresql@16/bin/psql -U $USER postgres -c "ALTER DATABASE pm_platform OWNER TO postgres; ALTER DATABASE pm_platform_test OWNER TO postgres;")
